zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston於大約1378年出生在英國德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓時，他的父親Walter Blount29歲，母親Sancha de Ayala19歲。他於1413年與Margaret De Gresley在英國德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1444年在英國斯塔福爾被列為high sheriff。他去世於1456年3月13日在英國德比夏爾安巴斯頓享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston于大约1378年出生在英国德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓时，他的父亲Walter Blount29岁，母亲Sancha de Ayala19岁。他于1413年与Margaret De Gresley在英国德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1444年在英国斯塔福爾被列为high sheriff。他去世于1456年3月13日在英国德比夏爾安巴斯頓享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston was born about 1378, in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England, his father, Walter Blount, was 29 and his mother, Sancha de Ayala, was 19. He married Margaret De Gresley in 1413, in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. In 1444, at the age of 67, his occupation is listed as high sheriff in Staffordshire, England. He died on 13 March 1456, in Ambaston, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston est né environ 1378, à Elvaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Blount, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Sancha de Ayala, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Gresley en 1413, à Elvaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. En 1444, à l’âge de 67 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1456, à Ambaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Barton Blount, Derbyshire, England, Unit: Barton Blount, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston um 1378 in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Blount 29 und seine Mutter Sancha de Ayala 19. Er hat 1413 in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England Margaret De Gresley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1444, als er 67 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff in Staffordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. März 1456 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Ambaston, Derbyshire, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston è nato il circa 1378 nel Elvaston, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Walter Blount, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Sancha de Ayala, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Gresley nel 1413, nel Elvaston, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1444, all'età di 67 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Staffordshire, England. Morì il 13 marzo 1456, nel Ambaston, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Blount Baronet Elvastonが約1378年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアエルヴァストンで生まれた時，父Walter Blountは29歳，母Sancha de Ayalaは19歳であった。1413年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアエルヴァストンでMargaret De Gresleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1444年，67歳の時，イギリススタフォードシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1456年3月13日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアンバストンで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston(이)가 대략 1378년 영국 더비실르 엘바스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Blount(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Sancha de Ayala(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1413년 영국 더비실르 엘바스턴에서 Margaret De Gresley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1444년, 67세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1456년 3월 13일 영국 더비실르 아바스턴에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston nasceu aproximadamente 1378, em Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Blount, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Sancha de Ayala, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Gresley em 1413, em Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1444, com 67 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1456, em Ambaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Barton Blount, Derbyshire, England, Unit: Barton Blount, Derbyshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston родился около 1378 г. в местности элвастон, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Blount было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Sancha de Ayala, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Gresley в 1413 г. в местности элвастон, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1444 году, в возрасте 67 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности стаффордшир, Англия. Он умер 13 марта 1456 г. в местности эмбастон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston nació aproximadamente 1378, en Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Blount, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Sancha de Ayala, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margaret De Gresley en 1413, en Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1444, a la edad de 67 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1456, en Ambaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
